subject: Armed-behavior asks closed by filing the disarming lever
action: standing correction: when the deliverable IS the live effect (MONETA receive address / MINT_CHECKOUT_URL, LIMEN_DISPATCH, LIMEN_CENSOR_ISSUES_APPLY), closeout requires the valve ARMED or an irreducible-mint lever naming the real-world action — a beat-wired organ running in permanent dry-run, or an unset env arm, is an UNMET outcome, not a filed one. Enforcement is executable, not prose: RETRO-0708 armed-valve-audit beat check flags any beat-wired organ whose --apply/env arm is never passed; the two-week retro (docs/reviews/retro-2026-06-24--2026-07-08.md, finding 8) is the evidence lineage
authorised_by: operator ask 2026-07-08 — two-week retro: deliberate, critique, heal, evolve toward ideal forms; north stars: make-us-inevitable + pain-point-is-a-product
review: empirical close = armed-valve audit reports zero silently-off valves for a full week: censor mirror actually opening/closing issues, MONETA reachable with a non-empty checkout path or an explicit irreducible lever, LIMEN_DISPATCH decision recorded

subject: Asking the operator a question already decided in a registry
action: standing correction: before surfacing ANY choice to the operator, consult the owning registry (his-hand-levers.json / censor precedents / organ-ladder / pillars). If the decision is homed, DERIVE it — do not ask (asking-in-chat is the same anti-pattern as guessing; [[decisions-owned-by-organ-not-chat]], [[never-need-him-to-speak-again]]). Two corollaries from the originating session: (a) a set already decided elsewhere ('open all lanes') is opened in FULL, never re-picked from a menu; (b) a human-gated boundary is a CONFIGURABLE TIERED VALVE — all tiers coexist, each independently armable, safe defaults — never a one-of-N mode choice. Enforcement is executable, not prose: ask-gate.py DERIVE verdict (PR #758) short-circuits an ask that names an owned lever/precedent; the tiered-valve ideal-form is spec/outbound-valve.json audited by armed-valve-audit.
authorised_by: operator 2026-07-08 — 'we've decided this before and elsewhere—like all things' + 'why is it one or the other? all of the above always (configurable)'
review: empirical close = ask-gate DERIVE fires on registry-owned asks in the beat log AND no operator-facing menu recurs for an already-decided question for a full week

subject: Full local gate matrix run on docs-class branches
action: standing correction encoded: CLAUDE.md § Worktree Isolation & CI Gate Matrix scoping rule — scripts/verify-scoped.sh is the default push gate (maps changed paths to only the implicated gates and names every skip); the full verify-whole.sh is a pre-merge event for deploy-trigger/cross-component diffs, machine-serialized via LIMEN_VERIFY_LOCK_FILE; CI (pr-gate.yml + path-filtered ci.yml) remains the full-matrix layer and merge-policy.sh enforces the website guardrail; zero local gates is never an option
authorised_by: operator correction 2026-07-09 — killed a full local verify-whole on a four-file docs/data diff; full-matrix-on-every-branch is duplicated work, not extra safety
review: empirical close = docs-class branches ship with owning-predicate-only local runs and green PR CI; re-open if a scoped-gate branch ever merges a regression CI would not have caught
